content.en:
Ye Tian followed his own plan to execute.

He first copied the body of an eight-time Blood Transformation Realm Platinum Mantis, and then went to the territory of the Ancient Blood Crocodile.

Soon, he found several relatively weak primeval blood crocodiles, all of which were descendants of the Nine Ancient Genius-level Nine Blood Transformation Realm primeval blood crocodiles.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian directly took action and instantly killed those weak primeval blood crocodiles.

The next moment, an incomparably terrifying primeval blood crocodile appeared.

It stared at Ye Tian and shot directly.

Rumble!!!

This platinum mantis copy body and was directly killed in an instant.

Then, the primeval blood crocodile went to find the Platinum Mantis Clan theory.

However, Ye Tian once again made a commotion, and continued to use the second platinum mantis to copy the body to attack and kill the weak primeval blood crocodile.

The number of primeval blood crocodile races is scarce, and it is just such a primitive-level genius of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm, and the others are all its descendants, the very weak kind, so they can't stop Ye Tian's attack at all.

In a short time, some of the primeval blood crocodiles were almost killed.

At this time, the primeval blood crocodile of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm returned, and when he saw this scene, he went crazy directly and attacked and killed Ye Tian again.

"Almost, this primeval blood crocodile has gone mad, this time I went to the Platinum Mantis Clan not to theorize, but to directly attack and kill the Platinum Mantis Clan!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Sure enough.

Soon after, the primeval blood crocodile stormed into the territory of the Platinum Mantis clan and killed the Platinum Mantis on sight.

The primeval blood crocodile is killing like crazy, so naturally it doesn't care about everything.

Seeing this, the Nine Blood Transformation Realm primeval geniuses among the Platinum Mantis came out to stop the primeval blood crocodile and fought with it.

However, this primeval blood crocodile was too powerful, and it was desperate to kill the other weak platinum mantises.

There was no way, all the nine Blood Transformation Realm Platinum Mantis primeval-level geniuses had come to stop this primeval blood crocodile.

......

"The plan was successful, and the Nine Blood Transformation Realm Platinum Mantis in that small space left!"

Ye Tian knew that his opportunity had come.

So, he infiltrated this small space.

At this time, the other platinum mantis were all paying attention to the battle in the outside world, who still thought about the platinum blood marrow fluid in this small space!

Wow!

Ye Tian entered here, and then quickly collected the platinum blood marrow fluid here.

It swallowed the platinum blood pulp directly with its own stomach, sealing it inside the stomach space.

Because the energy contained in the platinum blood marrow fluid was too terrifying, he was slow to collect it.

Fortunately, the war in the outside world has been going on, so it has been given him for a long time.

"That's it!"

Ye Tian immediately left here.

However, taking advantage of the battle between the two sides, he left silently from behind.

In fact, not only Ye Tian was on the run, but many weak platinum mantis were also on the run, mainly because they were afraid of being affected, so they fled to a far away place and came back after the end of the war.

Therefore, Ye Tian's behavior was not strange at all.

It's just that the Platinum Mantis clan didn't expect that some clansmen would dare to disobey the order and go to the small space to steal the platinum blood marrow fluid.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already moved away from the territory of the Platinum Mantis Clan, and then transferred the Platinum Blood Marrow Fluid to Ye Tian's true body to copy the body.

After that, Ye Tian annihilated the platinum mantis replica body.

Although the territory of the Platinum Mantis Clan can continue to produce Platinum Blood Marrow, it will take a long time to produce a small amount of Platinum Blood Marrow.

As a result, he didn't have time to wait slowly.

So, he left the place directly.

As for the battle between the primeval blood crocodile and the platinum mantis clan, what the result was, he didn't have the heart to care.

"It's right here, there are relatively few Blood Transformation Realm creatures here, it's a good place for retreat!"

Ye Tian was going to refine the platinum blood marrow liquid here.

Of course, he won't stop exploring.

He will send other replica bodies to continue exploring the ruins of the Dragon Sea, and once there is a harvest, he will still send them back.

"Try the effect of the platinum blood marrow!"

Ye Tian absorbed, refined, and refined a drop of platinum blood pulp to refine his heart.

With the help of the platinum blood marrow fluid, Ye Tian's heart was slowly tempered.

"The effect is okay, but if you want to refine your heart to the extreme of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm, I'm afraid it's still not enough!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

He had to admit that it was really too difficult to refine the heart of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm primeval-level geniuses to the extreme!

The years passed.

Ye Tian's other replica body is also constantly being harvested, but there are very few resources that help heart tempering, or only a little bit has been found, which is not of much help.

And the platinum blood marrow fluid is also constantly consumed, and the heart is constantly being tempered and becoming stronger and stronger.

Finally this day.

The platinum blood pulp is depleted.

"Sure enough, I still haven't tempered my heart to the limit, but it should have been tempered to about 80%!" Ye Tian estimated.

But if the last 20% wants to be tempered, it will be more difficult.

......

An area of mist in endless darkness.

Ye Tian came here, and suddenly, he was shocked.

"It's ......"

He was afraid that he had made a mistake.

Because just now, the talent for copying throbbed in a way that hadn't been produced for a long time.

Of course, he knew very well what this meant.

That is, there are treasures here that attract copying talents, and can upgrade copying talents.

"I thought that the copying talent was at the limit, but I didn't expect it to be able to upgrade !!!"

Ye Tian was excited.

So, he immediately delved into this misty area to find the treasure by copying the induction of his talent.

As time passed, he got closer and closer to the treasure, and the throbbing of the talent for copying became stronger and stronger.

Just as he was about to arrive at the place where the treasure was, a gray beast slapped him to death.

"Creatures comparable to those that exist in the Bone Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian knew that he had some trouble getting that treasure, and it was obvious that the treasure was above the territory of that creature just now.

Through the exploration of the replication talent, it was learned that the creature was named the gray and white giant bear, and the flesh was so strong that it was not the same, and in the ruins of the dragon sea, he fought with the other party, and he couldn't even carry a move, and he would be killed directly.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian tried many times, and each time he was discovered by the gray and white giant bear.

Although he was also able to spot the gray and white giant bear, he couldn't dodge the opponent's attack, the opponent's strength was too strong, and his speed surpassed him.

Even if he used the Ancient Movement, the speed in the ruins of the dragon sea was not fast.

After thinking about it, Ye Tian felt that there was only one way to approach the territory of this gray and white giant bear.
